name: Mathew Kiprono Kiptoo
title: Computer Science Student
tagline: Passionate about software development, networking, and community transformation
about: A motivated Computer Science student seeking an industrial attachment opportunity to apply theoretical knowledge in practical settings, gain hands-on experience in software development, networking, IT support, or related fields, and contribute to organizational goals while developing professional skills. Passionate about the lives of the less privileged, with a vision of seeing a transformed society where everyone lives a decent life.
careerObjective: A motivated Computer Science student seeking an industrial attachment opportunity to apply theoretical knowledge in practical settings, gain hands-on experience in software development, networking, IT support, or related fields, and contribute to organizational goals while developing professional skills.
personality: I am an individual who is passionate in the lives of less privileged, with a vision of seeing transformed society where everyone lives a decent life.

experience.description: Led and managed student welfare in the dormitory, maintained discipline, and acted as a liaison between students and school administration.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

education.institution: Kiptabach Mixed Day and Boarding Primary School

tools: Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Access)

projects.name: Weather API
projects.description: A weather application that fetches real-time weather data using a public API. Built to demonstrate proficiency in API integration, asynchronous JavaScript, and frontend development.

projects.name: Kilimo Smart
projects.description: A farm management system designed to help farmers digitize their operations. Features include crop tracking, inventory management, and data-driven insights for better agricultural decision-making.

projects.name: Magic Patterns
projects.description: A creative project exploring algorithmic pattern generation and visualization. Demonstrates problem-solving skills and algorithmic thinking.

projects.name: Plagiarism Detector
projects.description: A tool focused on helping students work smarter by detecting plagiarism in academic submissions. Built with a focus on educational integrity.

testimonials.name: Mr. Fredrick Kipkoech
testimonials.text: Mathew is a disciplined and hardworking individual with strong leadership qualities and a genuine passion for learning.

testimonials.name: Mr. Amos Kibire
testimonials.text: A motivated and reliable young professional who demonstrates excellent problem-solving abilities and a strong work ethic.

testimonials.name: Mr. William Tanui
testimonials.text: Mathew is an open-minded individual with great initiative and a commitment to community development.

blogTopics.title: Why I Chose Computer Science
blogTopics.description: My journey from primary school in Kiptabach to pursuing a degree in Computer Science at Kabarak University, and how technology can transform communities.

blogTopics.title: My Vision for Community Transformation Through Technology
blogTopics.description: How I believe technology and software development can uplift the less privileged and create a more equitable society.

blogTopics.title: Lessons from Building My First API Project
blogTopics.description: What I learned building the Weather API project — from API integration to debugging asynchronous JavaScript.
